bibl.title: Hieratic, Demotic and Greek Studies and Text Editions. Of Making Many Books There Is No End: Festschrift in Honour of Sven P. Vleeming
bibl.seg: Koenraad Donker van Heel, Francisca A.J. Hoogendijk & Cary J. Martin (edd.), Hieratic, Demotic and Greek Studies and Text Editions. Of Making Many Books There Is No End: Festschrift in Honour of Sven P. Vleeming = Papyrologica Lugduno-Batava. XXXIV.
Leiden - Boston, Brill, 2018, xxiv-346 pp., 49 pll., figg. ISBN 978-90-04-34571-3. €175.
P. Vleeming 1-54. - Pp. xi-xii: K.D.v.H., F.A.J.H. & C.J.M., Preface; - xiii-xvi: Bibliography of Sven P. Vleeming (up to 2017). - Articles. - Text Editions. - Indexes.
